title: Implementation of Closure Order
content: A closure order shall be served upon the offender or the person in charge of the subject establishment. The closure shall be effected by sealing and padlocking the establishment and posting of notice of such closure in bold letters at a conspicuous place in the premises of the establishment. Whenever necessary, the assistance and support of the appropriate law enforcement agencies may be requested for this purpose.

metadata.source_file: Omnibus IRR of RA 8042 as amended by RA 10022.pdf
